title: BN Blood Particles (Forge/NeoForge)
description: The modification adds a couple of types of blood particles. Now every damage will be accompanied by profuse bleeding!
body:
## Brief overview of the new version and "HD" style.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/78qYDMvDEo8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>






## Description

The modification adds a couple of types of blood particles. Now every damage will be accompanied by profuse bleeding!

### Features

- The bleeding effect appears on all damage types except potion damage, drowning, and burning.
- Adds 13 types of particles. For each type of creature, corresponding particles will spawn.
- Texture Style Presets. Three texture styles are available: "HD" , "OLD" , "CUBIC". More details in the video.
- Shader support. Some types of particles glow even without shaders, with shaders this effect is simply enhanced.
- The number of particles is affected by the size of the creature and the amount of damage dealt.
- Added physics to particles, more precisely the effect of spreading and sticking to surfaces.
- Works with all types of weapons even with added mods also supports creatures added with mods.
- Ability to customize various aspects of the modification.

### Overview of texture styles.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**"CUBIC" texture style. Cubic particles with low quality textures.**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4rVkA9mmV8g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**The video is outdated and does not correspond to the current functionality of the mod. All mechanics have been improved in new versions. Only left the textures for the "OLD" style.**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/txRPtdKM0wE" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen=""></iframe>

</details>


### Other projects
[BN Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/bn-weapons) - Adds some beautiful weapons with their own abilities and a unique method of obtaining!


[![Discord](https://imgur.com/GFPtfoz.png)](https://discord.com/invite/kUrkrgfMzm)
- If you have any ideas to improve the mod or find any bugs please share it in Discord!
- Also, here you can follow all updates in real time and sometimes get access to test versions of mods.
